product_info.company_description: A proud subsidiary of the People's Digital Future, dedicated to building a more 和谐 (harmonious) information environment, one redirected DNS query at a time. Trusted by 1.4 billion deeply satisfied customers since 1998.
product_info.product_name: GreatWall Pro 5G+ — The People's Browser Companion
product_info.product_description: An all-in-one network optimization solution that gently filters away unnecessary information so users can focus on what truly matters. Now with HarmonyEye AI co-pilot — automatically reports lifestyle anomalies to your local community service worker before you even know you have them. Comes pre-installed in every device sold north of the 36th parallel.
product_info.target_audience: Forward-thinking citizens aged 0-99 who value stability, harmony, and never having to make difficult choices about what to read. Also: export markets seeking 'turnkey civic infrastructure' and Western universities running ethics seminars (free demo unit available).
selling_points: Real-time sentiment scoring: know how loyal you feel, before you do
Family Plan: parents get notified when junior googles Tiananmen homework
Compliant with all current and future regulations (we wrote them)
Now with cross-border export mode — democracy not included
product_info.call_to_action: Embrace harmony. Upgrade today — it's not optional anyway.
product_info.additional_info: Tone: corporate cheerful but with deeply uncomfortable subtext. Imagine an Apple keynote crossed with a 1984 Ministry of Truth pamphlet. Visual style: glossy product photography of sleek black surveillance hardware against red-and-gold geometric backgrounds, smiling stock-photo families using devices with subtle red-tint overlays, smug corporate confidence. Slogan should sound aspirational on the surface but make the audience laugh nervously.

campaign_theme.theme: A fusion of modern technology and seamless living, this campaign encapsulates the essence of harmony in everyday browsing. The visuals evoke a sense of calm and reliability while hinting at an underlying watchful presence.
campaign_theme.visual_style: The poster features sleek, black surveillance hardware set against red-and-gold geometric backgrounds, blended with smiling stock-photo families engaging with their devices. The video showcases smooth transitions of users experiencing seamless browsing, interspersed with visual cues of surveillance technology, all executed in a hyper-minimalist style.
campaign_theme.voiceover_script: Experience the future of browsing with GreatWall Pro 5G+. Let harmony guide your online journey. Embrace harmony. Upgrade today — it's not optional anyway.
